name: At-Home-Doc
description: Developer of a mobile-based medical platform designed to offer medical services at home. The company's platform is a home doctor service application that offers doctors, medications and laboratories anytime anywhere in less than 90-minutes, enabling patients and their family members to pick medical services as per requirement and get 24/7 healthcare consultation services at home.

name: Eyewa
description: Operator of an online optical store intended to simplify the eyewear shopping experience. The company's store offers several types of eyewear including sunglasses, prescription glasses, blue-light reading glasses, and contact lenses, enabling customers to have access to an easy and affordable fashion-focused experience.

name: GymNadz
description: Developer of a fitness application designed to help users get in shape, eat clean and stay on track. The company's application offers short real-time workouts that require very little equipment, clean easy-to-make recipes, and the guidance of a fitness professional, enabling women to monitor their progress and achieve specific fitness goals.

name: Keno
description: Provider of on-demand car wash and detailing service intended to avail car washing services from anywhere. The company's service offers car washing options by downloading an application where users can register themselves, specify their vehicle, and schedule a car wash by making an online payment, enabling vehicle owners to avail car care services directly to their doorstep anywhere, anytime.

name: Mr. Draper
description: Provider of an online fashion advisory platform intended to offer curated shopping service for men. The company's platform offers a personalized shopping service where one can seek new fashion suggestions from stylists and ask the kind of apparel to be worn for a particular occasion as per individual size, complexion, and height, enabling men shoppers to find and order personalized outfits that are delivered at desired venues.

name: Myu
description: Developer of a communication platform designed to facilitate proper communication with the school community. The company's application lets users communicate with their students by sending announcements and notifications to any mobile at any time along with attaching photos and voice notifications, enabling teachers to connect with the community without the need of sharing a phone number.

name: Nawah Scientific
description: Operator of an online destination intended to outsource scientific experiments. The company through its online platform, receives experiment requests, offering a core hub of advanced research equipment specializing in natural and medical sciences and providing services online and on-demand, enabling scientists to carry out world-class research regardless of their laboratory equipment, this revolutionizes the scientific research ecosystem.

name: PlantShop.me
description: E-commerce store selling plants & gardening products

name: Vbout
description: Developer of a marketing automation platform designed to provide email marketing and automation, social media, landing pages, and analytics in one dashboard. The company's platform includes email and social media tools, lead intelligence, and comprehensive analytics while also assisting in creating a sales funnel to convert visitors into leads by nurturing them with automated, personalized content, enabling clients to make their marketing efforts efficient and effective, all from one dashboard.

name: Melltoo
description: TAKADAO offers a platform for halal takaful powered by the blockchain, creating an insurance alternative for the new, global age. For the first time, this allows Muslims from all over the world to access value aligned, transparent insurance at a never-before-possible scale.
